claim_boundary: Scoped v0.1.x local user-surface reference only; runtime support, production readiness, broad SQL/DataFrame parity, performance claims, and package-channel claims remain governed by dynamic capability reports and release gates.

semantic_claim_surface.dataframe_claim: documented subset of pandas/Polars-style operations with equivalent semantics for admitted operations, deterministic blockers for non-admitted operations, and no fallback execution
semantic_claim_surface.sql_claim: documented SQL-standard-inspired SELECT-query subset for admitted local and Vortex-native routes with documented deviations and deterministic blockers

admitted_fanout_runtime_methods.fanout: local JSONL/CSV fanout derived from native/prepared Vortex row-export routes with staged multi-target commit, target-level cleanup evidence, fallback_attempted=false, and external_engine_invoked=false

admitted_window_runtime_summary.rolling: fixed-row source-order rolling sum/mean/count/min/max with valid-observation min_periods and ShardLoom-native bounded window state

admitted_null_profile_methods.fillna: schema-declared scalar or per-column literal fill values lower to COALESCE projection rewrites for axis=0/index or projection-equivalent axis=1/columns spellings with inplace=false; fillna(method='ffill', limit=<optional positive int>) lowers to a native source-order forward-fill expression rewrite with bounded state
admitted_null_profile_methods.fill_null: alias for the admitted fillna COALESCE projection and forward-fill rewrite profiles

admitted_conditional_rewrite_methods.mask: typed scalar/null mask(predicate, scalar-or-null) over declared/projection columns through native Vortex expression-project
admitted_conditional_rewrite_methods.replace: typed full-cell scalar/null replace(old, scalar-or-null), column-mapped scalar/null replacement, admitted UTF-8 replace(pattern, replacement, regex=True), and in-place UTF-8 with_column("col", col("col").replace(...)) through native Vortex expression-project

admitted_duplicate_mask_methods.duplicated: subset-aware duplicated(..., keep='first'|'last'|False) boolean mask over declared/projection scalar columns through native/prepared Vortex duplicate-mask row-key state

admitted_drop_duplicate_methods.drop_duplicates: subset-aware drop_duplicates(..., keep='first'|'last'|False) retained-row deduplication over declared/projection scalar columns through native/prepared Vortex row-key retention state

admitted_plan_transform_methods.apply: explicit sl.plan_transform(...) wrappers that return a ShardLoom LazyFrame during lazy plan construction; terminal execution remains on the resulting native/prepared route
admitted_plan_transform_methods.pipe: explicit sl.plan_transform(...) wrappers that return a ShardLoom LazyFrame during lazy plan construction; terminal execution remains on the resulting native/prepared route

admitted_expression_runtime_methods.applymap: explicit sl.column_transform(...) wrappers for declarative native/prepared Vortex expression-project rewrites; Python cell callables remain blocked
admitted_expression_runtime_methods.eval: in-place numeric scalar assignment such as eval("amount = amount + 5") through the native/prepared Vortex expression-project primitive
admitted_expression_runtime_methods.map: explicit sl.column_transform(...) wrappers for declarative native/prepared Vortex expression-project rewrites; Python element callables remain blocked
admitted_expression_runtime_methods.map_rows: explicit sl.row_transform(...) wrappers for declarative native/prepared Vortex expression-project rewrites; Python row callables remain blocked
admitted_expression_runtime_methods.transform: mapping-style in-place numeric scalar assignment such as transform({"amount": sl.col("amount") + 5}) through the native/prepared Vortex expression-project primitive

admitted_reshape_runtime_methods.melt: explicit id_vars/value_vars flat scalar column-to-row expansion through the native/prepared Vortex melt primitive with heterogeneous scalar value columns and explicit source-order row-number materialization for ignore_index=false
admitted_reshape_runtime_methods.explode: single or same-length multi-column declared list/fixed-size-list row expansion with scalar, nullable, list, or struct element values, plus single-level list-of-struct dotted field projection, through the native/prepared Vortex explode primitive with explicit cardinality, null-shape, decode, and materialization evidence
admitted_reshape_runtime_methods.pivot: single index column, pivot column, and value column wide reshape through the native/prepared Vortex pivot primitive with first-unique duplicate-cell fail-closed policy and sparse/wide state evidence
admitted_reshape_runtime_methods.pivot_table: single index column, pivot column, and value column aggregate reshape through the native/prepared Vortex pivot primitive with sum/count/mean/min/max aggregate kernels plus admitted fill_value/dropna/margins output policy

admitted_window_runtime_methods.rolling: rolling(window=<positive int>, min_periods<=window, center=true|false).sum/mean/count/min/max(column, alias=...) over one scalar source-order column through the native/prepared Vortex rolling-window primitive; sum/mean/min/max require numeric inputs, count admits scalar rows, and centered windows use bounded lookahead evidence

admitted_shapes: local-source SELECT over local file references
declared Vortex input bound to a logical SQL table name
projection, filter, group-by, having, order, limit
generated range or generate_series forms where admitted
